response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong software engineering practices and product launch experience, but critically fails the minimum C++ requirement with only ~6 months of documented C++ work versus the required 8 years. Recent career focus has been TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack development rather than systems programming. While leadership and mentoring experiences are present, they are informal and recent, and there is insufficient evidence of owning large-scale cloud infrastructure systems at the required level.
strengths: Proven ability to ship products to production with strong commitment to testing, TDD, and engineering best practices
Demonstrates technical leadership through organizing workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring others
Full-stack technical versatility with hands-on experience across multiple languages and architectural approaches
concerns: Critical gap in required C++ experience—documented as only 6 months (2014-2015) against 8-year minimum
Recent 10-year career trajectory focuses on TypeScript/JavaScript and web technologies, not systems or C++ programming
Limited evidence of leading or architecting large-scale distributed cloud infrastructure systems at the required depth
